headline: Big Tech earnings test tech's big rotation: What to watch this week
summary: Earnings results from Alphabet and Tesla headline a busy week, amid a chip sell-off and a conflict in Iran that keeps geopolitics simmering and oil prices rising.

raw.headline: Big Tech earnings test tech's big rotation: What to watch this week

headline: Dow Jones Futures Loom As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
summary: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. service members. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also report.
